title: phlomis flavescens
intro: Phlomis flavescens, also known as golden lemongrass, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family, Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Phlomis flavescens include reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, as well as exhibiting potential anticancer and antioxidant effects. Phlomis flavescens can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some traditional folk remedies for its antiseptic and expectorant properties.
